pattern: GPAS direct functional twin (per-layer learnable gate) + Spike-No-More gradient-spike stabilization + Keel highway depth-graded + Progressive Gradient Flow

deviations: Source-side R352 Norwegian fjord layer-graded gradient dissipation noted in 04_5_memory_check; R376 distinct in per-layer learnable coefficient + spike-trigger but adjacency real
honest_audit.borderline_notes: QAJAQ-DAMPER is a clean Pattern A/D — per-layer learnable scalar is GPAS's named contribution (judge 0.85). Without the spike-detector wrapper, QAJAQ collapses to GPAS-on-gradient instead of GPAS-on-activation.
